section.name: backup-strategy
section.summary: 3-2-1 backup strategy for solo-developer VPS: what to back up, what to skip, retention policy, and RPO/RTO targets.

rule.statement: Follow the 3-2-1 rule: 3 copies, on 2 different media, with 1 stored offsite.
rule.rationale: Server disk failure and accidental deletion are the most common data loss scenarios; they are both solved by local backups. Datacenter-level events (fire, provider outage) require offsite. Any fewer than 3 copies creates a single point of failure.

list.item: PostgreSQL database — critical, daily, pg_dump -Fc
Redis RDB snapshot — important, daily, docker cp
.env / secrets — critical, on change via restic
nginx configs and SSL certificates — important, on change
systemd unit files — important, on change
WireGuard config — important, on change
SSH sshd_config — important, on change
Crontab — important (crontab -l)
Application attachments / uploads — daily via restic
Application code — already in Git, clone from GitHub on restore
Python .venv directories — rebuilt from requirements.txt
Docker images — pulled from registry
RabbitMQ messages — transient by design
node_modules, build artifacts — regenerated at deploy time
Local backups: keep last 14 days, delete older via find -mtime +14
Offsite (restic): --keep-daily 7 --keep-weekly 4 --keep-monthly 6
7 daily snapshots cover recovery from the most common scenario: "yesterday worked, today is broken"
4 weekly + 6 monthly cover slow-burn issues discovered weeks later
RPO (max data loss): up to 24 hours of database changes with daily backups
RTO (recovery duration): 60-90 minutes with a documented runbook on a pre-provisioned server
Reduce RPO to 1 hour by running pg_dump hourly and keeping only the last 24 hourly dumps locally

rule.statement: Set up backups before any production data lands on the server, not after the first incident.
rule.rationale: The cost of setting up backups is fixed and small. The cost of data loss is unbounded. Waiting until after the first incident guarantees at least one incident with no recovery path.

section.reference: Full daily backup script: PostgreSQL + Redis + configs + restic upload + retention
Verify latest backup: dump integrity, age check, required files present
